text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A birthday present for me?! I-I don't know what to
say!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It's a lucky cat statue I got from a really lucky
spot down south. I just hope you don't already
have one like this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A lucky spot... down south? Add the distinct ring
of this bell, along with the weight...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C-could it be? Isn't this the fabled ultra-rare
lucky cat that only a few can ever hope to get
their hands on?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, thank you, thank you, thank you! This is the
best present ever!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
H-hehe... I'm just glad you aren't put off by my
present...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this? There's a scrap of paper stuck
to the box...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Doto! You forgot to take off the receipt!
